summary.allowed_use: Package C authorization-to-execution policy ledger;branch execution prioritization;runtime/substep, solver, wet, route/yield/detection claim-guard mapping

policy_rows.task: Build execution packet that selects low-cost and blocked/prohibitive cases and records no PRS/EAS promotion.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: runtime packet already passed for candidate smoke; production runtime still separate

policy_rows.task: Run guarded trajectory smoke for a low-cost trapezoid case and a blocked 526-substep stress case.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: runtime packet already passed for candidate smoke; production runtime still separate

policy_rows.task: Ask COMSOL side to mirror post-proof status before solver launch; this can precede actual COMSOL execution.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: branch-specific solver execution packet and source-hashed result evidence

policy_rows.task: Define fixed-pressure/fixed-velocity flow solver inputs and acceptance before any q_ch weighting.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: branch-specific solver execution packet and source-hashed result evidence

policy_rows.task: Define profile-aware grid, zeta/ionic-strength metadata, and blocked-bin handling.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: branch-specific solver execution packet and source-hashed result evidence

policy_rows.task: Define optical/reference solver or calibration evidence needed for true W_eff and detection response.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: branch-specific solver execution packet and source-hashed result evidence

policy_rows.task: Define passability/clogging/recovery/yield evidence fields and wet-control requirements.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: wet observation bundle with controls, replicates, uncertainty, and hashes

policy_rows.task: Bind q_ch/JRC/route_score/winner/yield/detection_probability to source hashes and branch pass states.
policy_rows.next_required_evidence: detector operator, ROI/slit throughput, and standard-particle calibration consuming sidewall reference field | sidewall-specific or validated-transfer wet observation rows for all endpoints
